full_text:
Lu Ji (Shiheng) 陸機
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Ji (陸機), styledShiheng. Under 20 when Wu fell, he was a leading composer of lyric poetry of his day. Lu Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Lu Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
